summary: Phase 1-3 features testing complete. All new features (Decision Engine, Life Timeline Planner, Client CRM) are working correctly. Backend APIs return correct data, frontend pages render properly with all expected UI elements. Fixed a bug in the old /api/decision-engine/health-score endpoint that was causing 500 errors on the Dashboard.

minor.issue: Was passing dict instead of FinancialProfile dataclass - FIXED

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts render correctly but warnings appear on initial load

passed_tests: Decision Engine - Financial Health Score display (74/100, grade B)
Decision Engine - Component breakdown (Savings Rate, Debt Level, Liquidity, Retirement Readiness, Diversification)
Decision Engine - Total Potential Impact calculation ($609K from 6 optimizations)
Decision Engine - Retirement Boost ($235K), Annual Tax Savings ($25K), Debt Reduction ($86K)
Decision Engine - 6 Recommended Actions with specific $ impact
Decision Engine - Expandable recommendation cards with 'What To Do', 'Additional Benefits', timeframe, difficulty
Decision Engine - Take Action and Learn More buttons in expanded cards
Life Timeline - Retirement Age slider (50-70, default 60)
Life Timeline - Retirement Net Worth projection ($6.6M at age 60)
Life Timeline - Years to Retirement display (15 years)
Life Timeline - Visual timeline with life events (Career Start, Current Position, House Upgrade, Child Education, Mortgage Paid Off, Retirement, Major Travel, Estate Planning)
Life Timeline - Financial impact display (+/- amounts for each event)
Life Timeline - Wealth Projection chart with retirement marker
Life Timeline - Milestones section (Six Figures, Quarter Millionaire, Half Millionaire, Millionaire, Double Millionaire, High Net Worth)
Life Timeline - Slider interaction updates projections in real-time
Life Timeline - Modified badge appears when slider changed
Life Timeline - Reset button restores defaults
Client CRM - Summary cards (4 Total Clients, 2 Active, 1 Prospects, 1 Review Due, $5,598,000 Total AUM)
Client CRM - Clients tab with searchable client list
Client CRM - Client cards showing net worth, income, status badges
Client CRM - Tasks tab with upcoming tasks
Client CRM - Workflows tab with advice pipeline visualization
Client CRM - Workflow stages (discovery, analysis, strategy, presentation, implementation, review)
Dashboard What-If Toggle - Still working after updates
Navigation - All new pages accessible from sidebar (Health Score, Life Timeline)
critical_code_review_comments: Chart width/height warnings in console - non-blocking but should be addressed for cleaner console output
All v2 endpoints working correctly with proper data structures
Old health-score endpoint was fixed to use FinancialProfile dataclass instead of dict
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1-3 features fully tested. Decision Engine at /decision-engine shows health score (74/100, grade B) with 6 recommendations totaling $609K potential impact. Life Timeline at /life-timeline has adjustable retirement age slider (50-70, default 60) with real-time projection updates. Client CRM at /clients shows 4 demo clients with summary cards and workflow pipeline. Compliance modal appears on first visit - set localStorage keys 'halcyon_compliance_v2' and 'wheeler_compliance_acknowledged' to skip.

mocked_apis.note: All financial data is MOCKED. CRM clients are demo data.
